# polymarket_price_history (Data Source)

Reads the historical price series for a CLOB outcome token, as a list of timestamped price samples suitable for charting.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "polymarket_market" "m" { id = "540817" }

data "polymarket_price_history" "yes" {
  token_id = data.polymarket_market.m.clob_token_ids[0]
  interval = "1w"
  fidelity = 60 # one sample per hour
}

output "samples" {
  value = length(data.polymarket_price_history.yes.history)
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `token_id` (String) CLOB ERC-1155 token ID of the outcome to quote. Obtain it from a market's `clob_token_ids` attribute.

### Optional

- `fidelity` (Number) Resolution of the series, in minutes. When omitted, the server chooses an appropriate resolution for the interval.
- `interval` (String) Time window to return, e.g. `1h`, `6h`, `1d`, `1w`, or `max`. Defaults to `1d` when omitted.

### Read-Only

- `history` (Attributes List) Price samples, oldest first. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--history))

<a id="nestedatt--history"></a>
### Nested Schema for `history`

Read-Only:

- `price` (Number) Price at the sample time, in `[0, 1]`.
- `timestamp` (Number) Sample time, in Unix seconds.
